summary: Total branch attendance follows the same pattern as NYPL's program attendance: Fiscal 2022 was still a pandemic-recovery year with limited hours, and attendance grew steadily as full service returned through Fiscal 2025, weathering a brief 2023 budget cut to Sunday hours that was restored the next year. The Fiscal 2026 figure is a partial-year total — the City's preliminary Fiscal 2026 report shows the first four months of the year running ahead of the same period in Fiscal 2025, suggesting the apparent drop is a reporting-lag effect rather than an actual decline.

sources.label: NYPL, Statement on Fiscal Year 2024 Budget Cuts (with BPL and QPL)
